name: Newmont Corporation
description: Newmont Corporation is the world's leading gold company and a producer of copper, silver, zinc, and lead. Founded in 1921 and headquartered in Denver, Colorado, the company operates a world-class portfolio of assets across Africa, Australia, Latin America & Caribbean, North America, and Papua New Guinea. Newmont is the only gold producer listed in the S&P 500 Index and is widely recognized for its principled environmental, social, and governance practices. The company focuses on creating value through sustainable and responsible mining while maintaining a strong commitment to safety and operational excellence.

investment_theses.company_type: Senior Gold Producer / Diversified Global Mining
